title: alyssum simulans
intro: Alyssum simulans, also known as lesser madwort, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alyssum simulans include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Alyssum simulans include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
